prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: relic icon sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sprite sheet for five relic icons.
Subject: five fantasy relic icons in one horizontal row: molten mantle, golden idol, crown of chains, merchant compass, prism sigil relic.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game relic icons, crisp inventory readability.
Composition/framing: equal icon cells, centered objects, clear silhouettes.
Color palette: antique gold, obsidian, fire orange, chain steel, compass brass, prism accents.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: exact one-color background #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no vignette; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no frame/panel/matte backdrop unless it is an actual relic component; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: do not use #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside relic artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
